_meta.title: The Andreescu Library — Dataset
_meta.description: Bibliographic catalogue of books authored, co-authored or edited by Titu Andreescu. Facts only (titles, authors, years, publishers, topics). Access links are generated at render time as live search links to legitimate retailers, library lending, and previews — no files are hosted or redistributed.
_meta.note_on_accuracy: Years reflect first or notable editions; several titles have multiple editions. Co-author lists name the collaborators we could verify; where a field is empty the lead author is Titu Andreescu and additional contributors may exist — verify on the retailer/publisher page. Goodreads lists ~88 records including editions and translations; reliable profiles cite 'more than 40' distinct books. We count 50+ distinct titles and collected volumes below.

books.title: 101 Problems in Algebra
books.subtitle: From the Training of the USA IMO Team
books.series: Training of the USA IMO Team
books.blurb: A graded set of algebra problems drawn from USA IMO team selection and training, with full solutions — an entry point into olympiad algebra.

books.title: 102 Combinatorial Problems
books.subtitle: From the Training of the USA IMO Team
books.series: Training of the USA IMO Team
books.blurb: Counting, bijections, the pigeonhole principle and extremal arguments, taught through 102 carefully chosen competition problems.

books.title: 103 Trigonometry Problems
books.subtitle: From the Training of the USA IMO Team
books.series: Training of the USA IMO Team
books.blurb: Identities, substitutions and trigonometric techniques that reach far beyond the classroom, built around 103 IMO-level problems.

books.title: 104 Number Theory Problems
books.subtitle: From the Training of the USA IMO Team
books.series: Training of the USA IMO Team
books.blurb: Divisibility, congruences, Diophantine ideas and more — a flagship of the training series and a favourite of serious students.

books.title: Mathematical Olympiad Challenges
books.blurb: A landmark collection organised by theme and technique; a 2nd edition (2009) expanded it. Widely used as a first serious olympiad book.

books.title: Mathematical Olympiad Treasures
books.blurb: Companion to 'Challenges': elegant problems across algebra, geometry, number theory and combinatorics, with instructive solutions.

books.title: A Path to Combinatorics for Undergraduates
books.subtitle: Counting Strategies
books.blurb: Builds combinatorial maturity from first principles toward research-level counting strategies.

books.title: Complex Numbers from A to …Z
books.blurb: Complex numbers as a tool for algebra and geometry — from the basics to olympiad applications. A 2nd edition appeared in 2014.

books.title: Number Theory
books.subtitle: Structures, Examples, and Problems
books.blurb: A two-part text: structured theory followed by a rich bank of solved and proposed problems.

books.title: An Introduction to Diophantine Equations
books.subtitle: A Problem-Based Approach
books.blurb: Classical and modern methods for solving equations in integers, developed entirely through problems.

books.title: Essential Linear Algebra with Applications
books.subtitle: A Problem-Solving Approach
books.blurb: A problem-driven path through linear algebra, bridging competition technique and university coursework.

books.title: Geometric Problems on Maxima and Minima
books.blurb: Optimisation in geometry by synthetic, algebraic and calculus methods — a beautiful, underrated classic.

books.title: Putnam and Beyond
books.blurb: An encyclopaedic problem course spanning the entire undergraduate curriculum — the standard companion for the Putnam exam. 2nd edition 2017.

books.title: Mathematical Bridges
books.blurb: Connects elementary results to deeper mathematics, building 'bridges' from high-school technique to real analysis and beyond.

books.title: Quadratic Diophantine Equations
books.blurb: A focused monograph on Pell-type and quadratic equations — research-flavoured, with historical context.

books.title: Problems from the Book
books.blurb: A celebrated, demanding tour of the most beautiful ideas in olympiad and beyond — often called a rite of passage. 2nd edition 2010.

books.title: Straight from the Book
books.blurb: A companion of fully worked, multi-method solutions to selected problems from 'Problems from the Book'.

books.title: 105 Algebra Problems
books.subtitle: from the AwesomeMath Summer Program
books.blurb: Algebra problems used at the AwesomeMath Summer Program, graded for serious training.

books.title: 106 Geometry Problems
books.subtitle: from the AwesomeMath Summer Program
books.blurb: Synthetic and computational geometry problems from AMSP, with thorough solutions.

books.title: 107 Geometry Problems
books.subtitle: from the AwesomeMath Year-Round Program
books.blurb: Year-round program geometry, continuing the 106 Geometry collection.

books.title: 108 Algebra Problems
books.subtitle: from the AwesomeMath Year-Round Program
books.blurb: A year-round companion of algebra problems for sustained training.

books.title: 110 Geometry Problems for the International Mathematical Olympiad
books.blurb: IMO-calibre geometry, selected and solved for the strongest students.

books.title: 117 Polynomial Problems
books.subtitle: from the AwesomeMath Summer Program
books.blurb: Everything from roots and symmetric functions to advanced polynomial identities, through 117 problems.

books.title: Lemmas in Olympiad Geometry
books.blurb: A systematic toolkit of the recurring lemmas that unlock hard olympiad geometry.

books.title: Awesome Polynomials for Mathematics Competitions
books.blurb: A theory-plus-problems treatment of polynomials aimed squarely at competition success.

books.title: Number Theory
books.subtitle: Concepts and Problems
books.blurb: A deep, comprehensive number theory course — concepts developed alongside a large, demanding problem set.

books.title: Topics in Functional Equations
books.subtitle: Third Edition
books.blurb: The standard reference for olympiad functional equations — methods, traps and a graded problem bank.

books.title: Topics in Geometric Inequalities
books.blurb: Inequalities that live in geometry — from classical results to contest-ready techniques.

books.title: Sums and Products
books.blurb: A focused study of manipulating sums and products — telescoping, symmetric functions, estimation.

books.title: A Romanian Problem Book
books.blurb: Problems selected from Romanian team-selection tests — a window into one of the great olympiad traditions.

books.title: Pristine Landscapes in Elementary Mathematics
books.blurb: Beautiful, accessible problems that reveal surprising depth in elementary mathematics.

books.title: Mathematical Induction
books.subtitle: A Powerful and Elegant Method of Proof
books.blurb: A dedicated study of induction in all its forms, with a wide range of worked applications.

books.title: Algebraic Inequalities
books.subtitle: New Vistas
books.blurb: Modern perspectives on inequalities — AM–GM, Cauchy–Schwarz, SOS and beyond — for the competition student.

books.title: Awesome Math
books.subtitle: Teaching Mathematics with Problem Based Learning
books.blurb: For teachers: how to run a problem-based mathematics classroom, distilled from the AwesomeMath philosophy.

books.title: Mathematical Olympiads: Problems and Solutions from Around the World
books.subtitle: Annual series, 1995–2001 (MAA)
books.blurb: Edited yearly volumes collecting national-olympiad problems worldwide with solutions — a treasured archive.

books.title: USA and International Mathematical Olympiads
books.subtitle: Annual series, 2000–2004 (MAA)
books.blurb: The official yearly record of USAMO and IMO problems with detailed solutions and commentary.

books.title: Mathematical Reflections — Collected Volumes
books.subtitle: 2006–2023, eight two-year books (XYZ Press)
books.blurb: Two-year hardcover collections of the free journal he founded: The First Two Years, The Next Two Years, Two More Years, Two Special Years (2014–15), Two Wonderful Years (2016–17), Two Lockdown Years (2020–21), Two Meaningful Years (2022–23). The journal itself is free online.
